model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Increase the Adam learning rate for faster optimization progress within the fixed 256-step budget."}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Disable the schedule because it regressed validation loss under the fixed-step regime; this restores the stronger constant-LR training behavior."}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 8","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Increase model capacity in the micro-resnet while keeping the training loop unchanged, which can reduce validation loss within the fixed 256-step budget."}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 32","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Increase classifier capacity to better use richer convolutional features from the widened backbone while keeping optimization settings unchanged."}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","secondary_modes":["caching"],"rationale":"Switch to AdamW to decouple weight decay from adaptive moments, which often improves generalization at the same learning rate and step budget."}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Revert to Adam because AdamW degraded validation loss in this fixed-budget setting."}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.2e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Slightly raise learning rate to speed optimization for the larger-capacity model within the same fixed 256-step budget."}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.2e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.4e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Continue the successful LR-scaling trend with a modest additional increase to improve fit within the fixed number of optimization steps."}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":["topk"],"rationale":"Slightly reduce regularization now that learning rate and capacity are higher, aiming for better fit within the fixed 256-step budget."}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 2e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Test a further reduction in weight decay after the previous improvement, to check if lighter regularization continues to help under the short training horizon."}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 2e-5","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Restore the better-performing regularization level after lower weight decay caused a loss regression."}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.4e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.5e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Probe a small additional LR increase near the current best region to potentially extract more progress within the same step budget."}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.5e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.4e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Return to the better-performing learning rate after the 1.5e-3 trial regressed validation loss."}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 20","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Try a moderate capacity increase from the current strong configuration to improve representation quality without a drastic compute jump."}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 20","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Revert the channel-width increase because it significantly worsened validation loss and likely over-expanded compute/capacity for this fixed-step setup."}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","secondary_modes":["topk"],"rationale":"Use a shorter second-moment timescale so Adam adapts faster in the limited 256-step budget, which can improve early optimization."}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Revert beta2 after the faster-moment setting slightly degraded validation loss."}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"Increase batch size to process more examples per optimizer step under the fixed-step budget, potentially improving loss with the same number of updates."}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.4e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.6e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["micro"],"rationale":"With the successful larger batch, try a proportional LR increase to improve optimization speed within the fixed step budget."}
